<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Priya Nakate — Developer Portfolio</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;600&family=Fraunces:ital,wght@0,700;0,900;1,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

        :root {
            --bg: #07091a;
            --bg2: #0f1229;
            --card: rgba(15,18,41,0.75);
            --text: #dde1f8;
            --muted: #8b8fba;
            --a1: #7c6ef7;
            --a2: #f063b8;
            --a3: #3ecfcf;
            --grad: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c6ef7 0%, #f063b8 100%);
            --glow1: rgba(124,110,247,0.25);
            --glow2: rgba(240,99,184,0.2);
        }

        html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

        body {
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
            background: var(--bg);
            color: var(--text);
            overflow-x: hidden;
        }

        /* ── Animated mesh background ── */
        .mesh {
            position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none;
            background:
                radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 60% at 15% 40%, rgba(124,110,247,0.12) 0%, transparent 60%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 85% 70%, rgba(240,99,184,0.1) 0%, transparent 60%),
                radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 30% at 50% 5%, rgba(62,207,207,0.07) 0%, transparent 55%);
            animation: meshPulse 18s ease-in-out infinite alternate;
        }
        @keyframes meshPulse {
            0%   { transform: scale(1) rotate(0deg); opacity: .9; }
            100% { transform: scale(1.08) rotate(2deg); opacity: 1; }
        }

        /* ── Floating particles ── */
        .stars { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; overflow: hidden; }
        .star {
            position: absolute; border-radius: 50%;
            background: white; opacity: 0;
            animation: twinkle var(--d, 4s) var(--del, 0s) ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        @keyframes twinkle {
            0%,100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(.5); }
            50%      { opacity: .7; transform: scale(1); }
        }

        /* ── Cursor glow ── */
        .cursor {
            position: fixed; width: 300px; height: 300px;
            border-radius: 50%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 999;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(124,110,247,0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            transition: left .12s ease, top .12s ease;
        }

        /* ── Layout ── */
        .container { max-width: 1100px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; position: relative; z-index: 1; }

        /* ── Hero ── */
        .hero {
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
            position: relative; z-index: 1;
            padding: 60px 24px;
        }
        .hero-inner {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 40px;
        }
        .hero-badge {
            font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: .75rem;
            letter-spacing: .15em; text-transform: uppercase;
            color: var(--a1); border: 1px solid rgba(124,110,247,.35);
            padding: 6px 20px; border-radius: 100px;
            animation: fadeSlideDown .8s ease-out both;
        }
        @keyframes fadeSlideDown {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-20px); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }
        .hero-name {
            font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: clamp(3rem,8vw,6.5rem);
            font-weight: 900; line-height: 1; text-align: center;
            background: var(--grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
            animation: fadeSlideUp 1s ease-out .2s both;
        }
        .hero-sub {
            font-size: clamp(.9rem,2vw,1.15rem); color: var(--muted); text-align: center;
            max-width: 520px; line-height: 1.7;
            animation: fadeSlideUp 1s ease-out .4s both;
        }
        @keyframes fadeSlideUp {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }

        /* ── Hero Image ── */
        .hero-img-wrap {
            position: relative;
            animation: heroReveal 1.4s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) .5s both;
        }
        @keyframes heroReveal {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(60px) scale(.95); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
        }
        .hero-img-wrap::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute; inset: -4px;
            border-radius: 24px;
            background: var(--grad);
            z-index: -1;
            filter: blur(20px); opacity: .5;
            animation: glowPulse 4s ease-in-out infinite;
        }
        @keyframes glowPulse {
            0%,100% { opacity: .4; filter: blur(20px); }
            50%      { opacity: .7; filter: blur(30px); }
        }
        .hero-img {
            display: block;
            max-width: min(860px, 90vw);
            width: 100%; border-radius: 20px;
            border: 1.5px solid rgba(124,110,247,.3);
            box-shadow: 0 30px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
            animation: float 7s ease-in-out 2s infinite;
        }
        @keyframes float {
            0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); }
            50%      { transform: translateY(-14px); }
        }

        .scroll-hint {
            display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
            color: var(--muted); font-size: .75rem; letter-spacing: .1em;
            animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out 2s both;
        }
        .scroll-hint svg { animation: bounce 2s ease-in-out infinite; }
        @keyframes bounce {
            0%,100% { transform: translateY(0); }
            50%      { transform: translateY(8px); }
        }
        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; }
        }

        /* ── Sections ── */
        section { padding: 90px 0; position: relative; z-index: 1; }

        .sec-title {
            font-family: 'Fraunces', serif;
            font-size: clamp(2rem,5vw,3.2rem); font-weight: 900;
            text-align: center; margin-bottom: 60px;
            background: var(--grad); -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text;
            position: relative; display: inline-block; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
        }
        .sec-title::after {
            content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -12px; left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            width: 60px; height: 3px; border-radius: 2px;
            background: var(--grad);
        }

        /* ── About Cards ── */
        .about-grid {
            display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
            gap: 20px;
        }
        .about-card {
            background: var(--card); backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(124,110,247,.18);
            border-radius: 16px; padding: 28px;
            transition: transform .35s ease, box-shadow .35s ease, border-color .35s ease;
            opacity: 0; animation: cardIn .7s ease-out forwards;
        }
        .about-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-6px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(124,110,247,.15);
            border-color: rgba(124,110,247,.45);
        }
        @keyframes cardIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(30px); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
        }
        .about-card .icon { font-size: 2.2rem; margin-bottom: 14px; }
        .about-card h3 {
            font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--a1);
            margin-bottom: 8px; letter-spacing: .02em;
        }
        .about-card p { font-size: .9rem; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; }

        /* ── Socials ── */
        .social-grid {
            display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; justify-content: center;
        }
        .social-badge {
            display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
            padding: 10px 22px; border-radius: 100px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(124,110,247,.3);
            color: var(--text); text-decoration: none;
            font-size: .88rem; font-weight: 600;
            background: var(--card); backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
            transition: all .3s ease;
        }
        .social-badge:hover {
            background: var(--grad); color: white;
            border-color: transparent;
            transform: translateY(-3px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 30px var(--glow1);
        }

        /* ── Tech Grid ── */
        .tech-grid {
            display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; justify-content: center;
        }
        .tech-badge {
            padding: 8px 20px; border-radius: 100px;
            font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: .8rem; font-weight: 600;
            border: 1px solid rgba(124,110,247,.25);
            background: rgba(124,110,247,.07);
            color: var(--text);
            transition: all .3s ease;
            animation: badgeIn .5s ease-out calc(var(--i,1) * 50ms) both;
        }
        .tech-badge:hover {
            background: rgba(124,110,247,.2);
            border-color: var(--a1); color: white;
            transform: scale(1.08);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(124,110,247,.3);
        }
        @keyframes badgeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(.8); }
            to   { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
        }

        /* ── Stats ── */
        .stats-grid {
            display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr));
            gap: 24px;
        }
        .stat-card {
            background: var(--card); backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(124,110,247,.18); border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 20px; text-align: center;
            transition: transform .35s ease, box-shadow .35s ease;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .stat-card:hover {
            transform: translateY(-5px);
            box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(124,110,247,.18);
        }
        .stat-card img { width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 10px; display: block; }

        /* ── Trophy ── */
        .trophy-wrap {
            text-align: center; overflow-x: auto;
        }
        .trophy-wrap img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 10px; }

        /* ── Quote ── */
        .quote-box {
            max-width: 750px; margin: 0 auto;
            background: var(--card); backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(240,99,184,.25); border-radius: 20px;
            padding: 40px; text-align: center; position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .quote-box::before {
            content: '\201C';
            position: absolute; top: -10px; left: 20px;
            font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-size: 8rem;
            color: rgba(240,99,184,.12); line-height: 1;
        }
        .quote-text {
            font-family: 'Fraunces', serif; font-style: italic;
            font-size: clamp(1.1rem,2.5vw,1.4rem); color: var(--text);
            line-height: 1.7; position: relative; z-index: 1;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        .quote-author {
            font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: .8rem;
            color: var(--a2); letter-spacing: .08em;
        }
        .quote-refresh {
            margin-top: 20px; padding: 8px 24px; border-radius: 100px;
            background: var(--grad); border: none; color: white;
            font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif; font-size: .85rem; font-weight: 600;
            cursor: pointer; transition: opacity .2s, transform .2s;
        }
        .quote-refresh:hover { opacity: .85; transform: scale(1.04); }

        /* ── Top Contributions ── */
        .contrib-wrap {
            background: var(--card); backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
            border: 1px solid rgba(124,110,247,.18); border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 24px; text-align: center; overflow-x: auto;
        }
        .contrib-wrap img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 10px; }

        /* ── Footer ── */
        footer {
            padding: 50px 0; text-align: center; border-top: 1px solid rgba(124,110,247,.12);
            position: relative; z-index: 1;
        }
        footer p { color: var(--muted); font-size: .9rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
        .visitor-badge img { height: 22px; }

        /* ── Divider ── */
        .divider {
            height: 1px; max-width: 200px; margin: 0 auto;
            background: var(--grad); opacity: .3; border-radius: 1px;
        }

        /* ── Reveal on scroll ── */
        .reveal {
            opacity: 0; transform: translateY(40px);
            transition: opacity .8s ease, transform .8s ease;
        }
        .reveal.visible {
            opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0);
        }

        @media (max-width: 600px) {
            .about-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
            .stats-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <div class="mesh"></div>
    <div class="stars" id="stars"></div>
    <div class="cursor" id="cursor"></div>

    <!-- HERO -->
    <div class="hero">
        <div class="hero-inner container">
            <div class="hero-badge">✦ Developer Portfolio</div>
            <h1 class="hero-name">Priya Nakate</h1>
            <p class="hero-sub">Turning coffee into software, one commit at a time ☕→ &lt;/&gt;</p>
            <div class="hero-img-wrap">
                <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Developer Workspace" class="hero-img">
            </div>
            <div class="scroll-hint">
                <span>Scroll to explore</span>
                <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/>
                </svg>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ABOUT -->
    <section id="about" class="reveal">
        <div class="container">
            <h2 class="sec-title">💫 About Me</h2>
            <div class="about-grid">
                <div class="about-card" style="animation-delay:.1s">
                    <div class="icon">🔭</div>
                    <h3>Currently Working On</h3>
                    <p>Improving my coding skills and building side projects.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="about-card" style="animation-delay:.2s">
                    <div class="icon">👯</div>
                    <h3>Looking to Collaborate</h3>
                    <p>Interesting open-source projects that challenge me.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="about-card" style="animation-delay:.3s">
                    <div class="icon">🤝</div>
                    <h3>Looking for Help With</h3>
                    <p>Mastering new frameworks and best practices.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="about-card" style="animation-delay:.4s">
                    <div class="icon">🌱</div>
                    <h3>Currently Learning</h3>
                    <p>Modern web technologies and system design.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="about-card" style="animation-delay:.5s">
                    <div class="icon">💬</div>
                    <h3>Ask Me About</h3>
                    <p>Anything tech-related or my journey as a developer.</p>
                </div>
                <div class="about-card" style="animation-delay:.6s">
                    <div class="icon">⚡</div>
                    <h3>Fun Fact</h3>
                    <p>I write code because I enjoy turning coffee into software.</p>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <div class="divider"></div>

    <!-- SOCIALS -->
    <section id="socials" class="reveal">
        <div class="container">
            <h2 class="sec-title">🌐 Connect With Me</h2>
            <div class="social-grid">
                <a href="https://instagram.com/Priya_nakte" class="social-badge" target="_blank">📷 Instagram</a>
                <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/priyanakate" class="social-badge" target="_blank">💼 LinkedIn</a>
                <a href="https://pinterest.com/nakatep35" class="social-badge" target="_blank">📌 Pinterest</a>
                <a href="https://mastodon.social/@PRIYA_NAKATE" class="social-badge" target="_blank">🐘 Mastodon</a>
                <a href="mailto:nakatepriya525@gmail.com" class="social-badge">✉️ Email</a>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <div class="divider"></div>

    <!-- TECH STACK -->
    <section id="tech" class="reveal">
        <div class="container">
            <h2 class="sec-title">💻 Tech Stack</h2>
            <div class="tech-grid">
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:1">C</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:2">C++</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:3">Java</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:4">Python</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:5">PHP</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:6">HTML5</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:7">Node.js</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:8">.NET</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:9">Oracle</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:10">Vercel</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:11">SQLite</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:12">PostgreSQL</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:13">MongoDB</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:14">MySQL</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:15">Git</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:16">GitHub</span>
                <span class="tech-badge" style="--i:17">Windows Terminal</span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <div class="divider"></div>

    <!-- GITHUB STATS -->
    <section id="stats" class="reveal">
        <div class="container">
            <h2 class="sec-title">📊 GitHub Stats</h2>
            <div class="stats-grid">
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <img src="https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api?username=nakatepriya525&theme=radical&hide_border=true&include_all_commits=true&count_private=false&show_icons=true" alt="GitHub Stats" loading="lazy">
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <img src="https://streak-stats.demolab.com/?user=nakatepriya525&theme=radical&hide_border=true" alt="GitHub Streak" loading="lazy">
                </div>
                <div class="stat-card">
                    <img src="https://github-readme-stats.vercel.app/api/top-langs/?username=nakatepriya525&theme=radical&hide_border=true&layout=compact&langs_count=8" alt="Top Languages" loading="lazy">
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <div class="divider"></div>

    <!-- TROPHIES -->
    <section id="trophies" class="reveal">
        <div class="container">
            <h2 class="sec-title">🏆 GitHub Trophies</h2>
            <div class="trophy-wrap">
                <img src="https://github-profile-trophy.vercel.app/?username=nakatepriya525&theme=radical&no-frame=true&no-bg=true&margin-w=6&column=6" alt="GitHub Trophies" loading="lazy">
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <div class="divider"></div>

    <!-- DEV QUOTE — rendered in JS, no broken image -->
    <section id="quote" class="reveal">
        <div class="container">
            <h2 class="sec-title">✍️ Random Dev Quote</h2>
            <div class="quote-box">
                <p class="quote-text" id="qText">Loading a fresh quote…</p>
                <p class="quote-author" id="qAuthor"></p>
                <button class="quote-refresh" onclick="loadQuote()">↻ New Quote</button>
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <div class="divider"></div>

    <!-- TOP CONTRIBUTIONS -->
    <section id="contributions" class="reveal">
        <div class="container">
            <h2 class="sec-title">🔝 Top Contributed Repos</h2>
            <div class="contrib-wrap">
                <img
                    src="https://github-contributor-stats.vercel.app/api?username=nakatepriya525&limit=5&theme=radical&combine_all_yearly_contributions=true"
                    alt="Top Contributions"
                    loading="lazy"
                    onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='<p style=\'color:var(--muted);padding:20px\'>Contribution stats loading — visit <a href=\'https://github.com/nakatepriya525\' style=\'color:var(--a1)\'>GitHub</a> to see contributions.</p>'"
                >
            </div>
        </div>
    </section>

    <!-- FOOTER -->
    <footer>
        <div class="container">
            <p>Crafted with 💜 by Priya Nakate</p>
            <div class="visitor-badge">
                <img src="https://komarev.com/ghpvc/?username=nakatepriya525&color=7c6ef7&style=flat-square" alt="Profile Views" loading="lazy">
            </div>
        </div>
    </footer>

    <script>
    // ── Stars
    (function() {
        const c = document.getElementById('stars');
        for (let i = 0; i < 80; i++) {
            const s = document.createElement('div');
            s.className = 'star';
            const sz = Math.random() * 2.5 + .5;
            s.style.cssText = `width:${sz}px;height:${sz}px;top:${Math.random()*100}%;left:${Math.random()*100}%;--d:${(Math.random()*5+2).toFixed(1)}s;--del:${(Math.random()*8).toFixed(1)}s`;
            c.appendChild(s);
        }
    })();

    // ── Cursor
    const cur = document.getElementById('cursor');
    document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
        cur.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
        cur.style.top  = e.clientY + 'px';
    });

    // ── Scroll reveal
    const ro = new IntersectionObserver(entries => {
        entries.forEach(e => { if (e.isIntersecting) e.target.classList.add('visible'); });
    }, { threshold: 0.1 });
    document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el => ro.observe(el));

    // ── Dev Quotes (no external API dependency)
    const quotes = [
        { text: "Any fool can write code that a computer can understand. Good programmers write code that humans can understand.", author: "Martin Fowler" },
        { text: "First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.", author: "John Johnson" },
        { text: "Experience is the name everyone gives to their mistakes.", author: "Oscar Wilde" },
        { text: "In order to be irreplaceable, one must always be different.", author: "Coco Chanel" },
        { text: "Java is to JavaScript what car is to Carpet.", author: "Chris Heilmann" },
        { text: "Knowledge is power.", author: "Francis Bacon" },
        { text: "Sometimes it pays to stay in bed on Monday, rather than spending the rest of the week debugging Monday's code.", author: "Dan Salomon" },
        { text: "Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but rather when there is nothing more to take away.", author: "Antoine de Saint-Exupery" },
        { text: "Ruby is rubbish! PHP is phpantastic!", author: "Nikita Popov" },
        { text: "Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it's bad.", author: "Cory House" },
        { text: "Fix the cause, not the symptom.", author: "Steve Maguire" },
        { text: "Optimism is an occupational hazard of programming: feedback is the treatment.", author: "Kent Beck" },
        { text: "When to use iterative development? You should use iterative development only on projects that you want to succeed.", author: "Martin Fowler" },
        { text: "Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.", author: "Austin Freeman" },
        { text: "Before software can be reusable it first has to be usable.", author: "Ralph Johnson" },
        { text: "Make it work, make it right, make it fast.", author: "Kent Beck" },
    ];
    let lastIdx = -1;
    function loadQuote() {
        let idx;
        do { idx = Math.floor(Math.random() * quotes.length); } while (idx === lastIdx);
        lastIdx = idx;
        const q = quotes[idx];
        const el = document.getElementById('qText');
        el.style.opacity = 0;
        setTimeout(() => {
            el.textContent = q.text;
            document.getElementById('qAuthor').textContent = '— ' + q.author;
            el.style.transition = 'opacity .5s';
            el.style.opacity = 1;
        }, 300);
    }
    loadQuote();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
